---
title: "Simulation"
description: "Generating model predictions"
---

Simulation generates recall sequences from a model given study lists.

## The TrialSimulator Protocol

```python
class TrialSimulator(Protocol):
    def __call__(
        self,
        model: MemorySearch,
        present: Integer[Array, " study_events"],
        trial: Integer[Array, " recalls"],
        rng: PRNGKeyArray,
    ) -> tuple[MemorySearch, Integer[Array, " recall_events"]]:
        """Returns model and simulated recall sequence."""
        ...
```

## Usage

*Coming soon: simulation examples*
